title: sida loretana
intro: Sida loretana, also known as the Loretto fanpetals, is a species of flowering plant in the mallow family. It is used in traditional medicine, particularly in Latin America, due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and alleviating pain, although more research is needed to confirm these claims. Sida loretana can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is sometimes used in combination with other herbs to enhance its effects.
